zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Periton於1235年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾法可頓時，她的父親Adam de Periton30歲，母親Sarah d'Ellington31歲。她於1254年與William de Welles在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1314年1月5日之前，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾馬爾頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Periton于1235年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾法可頓时，她的父亲Adam de Periton30岁，母亲Sarah d'Ellington31岁。她于1254年与William de Welles在英国英格兰林可爾史爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1314年1月5日之前，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾馬爾頓。

nameMeanings.name: Periton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Domenic, Carmela, Romeo, Sal, Santo.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Periton was born in 1235, in Faxton, Northamptonshire, England, her father, Adam de Periton, was 30 and her mother, Sarah d'Ellington, was 31. She married William de Welles in 1254, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died before 5 January 1314, and was buried in Malton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

et.North Wales: North Wales, Montgomery, Pennsylvania, Ameerika Ühendriigid

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Periton est née en 1235, à Faxton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Adam de Periton, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Sarah d'Ellington, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé William de Welles en 1254, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée avant 5 janvier 1314, et a été enterrée à Malton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Januar 1314 und wurde in Malton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Periton(이)가 1235년 영국 노르섬프토실르 파스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Adam de Periton(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah d'Ellington(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1254년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 William de Welles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1314년 1월 5일 이전 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 맬턴에 묻혔다.
